title: arenaria lanuginosa var. diffusa
intro: Arenaria lanuginosa var. diffusa, also known as woolly sandwort, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria lanuginosa var. diffusa include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of woolly sandwort typically involve the use of its leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
